message:
feat(render): add generation counter to GraphemeId and fix orphan continuation cell rendering

GraphemeId: Embed an 8-bit generation counter in the packed representation to
detect stale access to reused pool slots (ABA problem). The slot field shrinks
from 24 to 16 bits (64K entries — sufficient for any single frame's unique
graphemes), and the freed 8 bits store a generation that increments on reuse.
Constructor, accessor, and Debug impl updated accordingly.

Presenter: Change orphan continuation cell handling to write a space character
instead of issuing CUF (cursor forward). This ensures any garbage left from a
partially-overwritten wide character is visually cleared rather than merely
skipped over, preventing ghost artifacts on terminals that don't auto-clear
under cursor movement.

Also adds textarea_wrap regression test module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
